scripts.dev:clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true });" && next dev
scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host 'Port 3000 process terminated.' } else { Write-Host 'Port 3000 is already free.' }"
